title: Mobile browser log in for multiple users linked to company platform
excerpt: Hi, I require the field team to use the platform not through the app while on site but through the browser on iPad and mobile. I will be asking them to delete the APP and log in to browser. But I’m struggling to get them…

posts.author: markporter (Mark Porter)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I require the field team to use the platform not through the app while on site but through the browser on iPad and mobile. I will be asking them to delete the APP and log in to browser. But I’m struggling to get them all logged in. Has anyone a step by step or a video that i can share. Thanks

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
What ‘issue’ are they running into when they try? Make sure they’re accessing your link ie company.monday.com instead of www.monday.com

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com
